hero_headline: You're Full Tonight. Your Guest Doesn't Have to Leave Empty-Handed.
hero_subheadline: Lodge-Link connects your hotel to a trusted network. When you can't host a guest, we find them a room — and you maintain the relationship.
cta_button: Join the Network — Free for 30 Days
trust_bar: Trusted by 47 hotels across Addis Ababa, Lalibela, and Hawassa
step_1_desc: Your hotel is full and a guest walks in.
step_2_desc: Lodge-Link finds availability at a trusted partner.
step_3_desc: Guest gets a room, and you get the trust credit.
after_1: "Let me find you an option right now"
before_4: No data on where guests go
